chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No. D-545 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge Hearing 1. For order on CMA No. 3842/2025 (Urgent/A) 2. For order on office objection No.1, 2, 3, 22, 23, 32 & 34 3. For order on CMA No. 3354/2025 (Exemption) 4. For order on CMA No. 3355/2025 (Stay) 5. For hearing of main case 21-02-2025 Mr. Munir Ahmed Khan, Advocate for Petitioner Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General 1. Urgency granted. 2-5. Per learned counsel the grievance herein has already been escalated in the statutory hierarchy as appeal under Rule 71 of the Sindh Mining Concession Rules, 2020. Admittedly this appeal was filed in November 2024, no case is made out to entertain this petition as a parallel recourse to seek the same relief has already been availed. Petition is found to be misconceived and hence the same is dismissed.. Judge Judge Amjad PS
